extract: This article is about the move Agility. For the field move, see Field Move (Ranger). Agility (Japanese: こうそくいどう High-speed Movement) is a non-damaging Psychic-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TR12 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM004 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM047 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
